Zhejiang Xincheng Electric Co., Ltd. presents a definitive case of regional industrial migration within China's manufacturing sector. Extracting its historical data reveals that the company was originally established in Liaoning Province ('Liaoning Huacheng Electric Co.' / 'Liaoning Longfa Electric Equipment').
